# --- cc-templates v4 multi-CLI agent config (gitignore additions) ---

# Claude AI settings and sessions (user-specific)
.claude/*
!.claude/settings.json
!.claude/skills/

# Codex / Antigravity IDE skill files (auto-generated by BMad installer if used)
.agents/

# Antigravity CLI user-level config — writes to ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/.
# The directory name carries the legacy Gemini brand because Antigravity
# inherited the path; Antigravity is the active CLI (Gemini CLI was sunset
# 2026-06-18). This path stays gitignored.
.gemini/

# Antigravity CLI per-project state.
# agy creates .antigravitycli/<project-uuid>.json symlinked into ~/.gemini/config/projects/
# (verified in anchor S73 / 2026-05-27 — see anchor memory reference-antigravity-cli-install).
# Defensive .agy/ + .antigravity/ also gitignored in case future agy versions change layout.
.agy/
.antigravity/
.antigravitycli/

# --- end cc-templates additions ---
